\tzpentry{ID3658}{Propagator Functional}
\paragraph{Canonical Statement.}
ID3658 introduces Propagator Functional as a source-extracted canonical equation candidate. The equation is promoted from the Tier A equation-source intake and remains pending source-context expansion, duplicate review against the earlier TZPID corpus, Wolfram normalization, symbol-key enrichment, and derivation/proof-lane construction.
\paragraph{Canonical Equation.}
\begin{equation} v_{\text{rot}}^2(r) = \frac{GM(<r)}{r} + \frac{8\pi G}{c^2} \int_0^{t_{\text{gal}}} r\Sigma(r,\tau) e^{-(t-\tau)/\tau_{\text{gal}}} d\tau \end{equation}
